electroacoustic.max_spl_note: Peak level at 1 m, free field, pink noise crest factor 4, [X15] preset
electroacoustic.directivity: 40 degrees horizontal x 60 degrees vertical (ellipsoid waveguide, no secondary lobes)
electroacoustic.components: LF: 1x 15-inch neodymium transducer in bass-reflex cabinet with L-Vents laminar vented ports; HF: 1x 3-inch neodymium-diaphragm compression driver on ellipsoid waveguide, coaxially loaded

operating_modes: Standard latency (point source / FOH and monitor)
Low-latency monitor mode ([X15_MO]: 1.18 ms on LA8, 0.84 ms on LA4X/LA12X versus 3.84 ms standard)
amplification.preset_note: [X15] for point-source/FOH use, [X15_MO] for stage-monitor use (low-latency); sub crossover presets [SB18_100], [KS21_60], [KS21_100] used on the paired subwoofer channels

connection.input_connector: 2x 4-point speakON (NL4), interchangeable IN/LINK; internal pinout 1+/1- = LF, 2+/2- = HF
connection.breakouts: Driven via SP loudspeaker cables (4-point, 4 mm2); PA-COM breakouts available (8-point PA-COM to 2x 4-point speakON, or to 1x 4-point + 2x 2-point speakON) for combined enclosure+sub runs

physical.dimensions_mm: 580 (W) x 430 (H) x 375 (D) approx. (trapezoidal cabinet; H 430 mm, W 580 mm, D 375 mm)
physical.cabinet: First-grade Baltic birch and beech plywood, dark grey brown Pantone 426C (custom RAL on special order), four bottom runners, two side handles
physical.monitor_angle: 35 degrees from vertical (flat), or 55 degrees with built-in risers deployed

modes: Stage monitor (floor, dual 35/55-degree angle via risers)
rigging_accessories: X-UTILT (tilt-adjust wall bracket, 0 to -45 degree site angle)
X-BAR (single-enclosure rigging bar, 10 angulations, Ø12 mm shackle WLL 1 t)
deployment.rigging_inserts: M8 DIN580 insert for secondary safety; 4x M10 threaded inserts; 2x 35 mm pole sockets; 2x handles

usage: Reference coaxial stage wedge: the coaxial 15-inch + 3-inch arrangement gives a point-source tonal balance and tight 40x60 ellipsoid pattern, yielding strong feedback rejection on a loud stage.
Drive with LA4X (2 cabinets max), LA12X (6 max), or LA7.16i (8 max); each enclosure consumes 2 amplifier channels (LF + HF) over a single 4-point speakON.
Use the [X15_MO] low-latency monitor preset for wedge duty to cut latency to under ~1.2 ms; switch to [X15] for FOH/point-source/narrow-fill work.
Built-in risers flip the wedge between a 35-degree and 55-degree monitoring angle without extra hardware; deploy upright via X-BAR, U-brackets, or pole socket for fills.

Pair 1:1 with an SB18 (or KS21) for LF extension; the subwoofer takes a dedicated [SB18_100]/[KS21] crossover preset, and a custom preset is required when combining a sub with the low-latency monitor preset.
Lightweight (21 kg) IP43 plywood cabinet with side handles suits fast monitor-world deployment and light outdoor/install use; observe per-amp count limits when daisy-chaining via LINK.
